title: scrophularia balbisii var. macrophylla
intro: Scrophularia balbisii var. macrophylla, also known as the large-leaved figwort, is a perennial plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) that is native to Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities. The large-leaved figwort is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, flu, and digestive problems.
